heading: Remove an Atlas Network Peering Connection
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo delete the network peering connection you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas networking peering delete <peerId> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas networking peering delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-networking-peering-delete).**Ui:**Atlas UITo remove your network peering connection using the Atlas UI:
